summary: Completed phases 1-7 of 15 plus QLemma.lean from phase 8. Eliminations.lean (902 lines) and QLemma.lean (459 lines) ported with zero sorry, zero axioms, verified build. Cases.lean (1768 lines) and 7 more phases remain.

continuation_context.notes: Phase 8 has QLemma.lean done. Cases.lean (1768 lines) is the remaining file. KEY PORTING PATTERNS (cycle 2 discoveries): (1) int_truth_and_iff -> (int_truth_and M t _ _) with explicit M t args. (2) After subst, the RHS variable of the equality is eliminated (e.g., subst hut where hut : u = t eliminates t, replaced by u). Use the surviving variable name in subsequent references. (3) simp with int_truth_neg fires before int_truth_and when both present, breaking the and-pattern. Use rw for sequential control: rw [int_truth_and] first, then rw [int_truth_neg]. Or construct proof terms directly: (int_truth_and M t _ _).mpr <...>. (4) Formula.and/neg/or are abbrevs that auto-unfold. Don't include them in simp calls. (5) For all_past handling in backward proofs: use have ... := (int_truth_and M t _ _).mp hand then (int_truth_neg M t _).mp on each component.
